ocr.text: In the Alibaba Group report for Dec-23, the Fulfillment Cost Analysis reveals a comprehensive breakdown by region, reporting
a total of 500K orders in Asia-Pacific with total costs of ¥1.5B, where shipping costs account for 15% or ¥300M, packaging
costs represent ¥800M, and handling costs equal ¥400M, resulting in an average cost per order of ¥2,667 or 12% of revenue.
North America, with 700K total orders, incurs costs of ¥1.8B, with shipping at 11%, totaling ¥200M, packaging costs of
¥300M, and handling costs of ¥1.2B, averaging ¥2,500 per order or 10% of revenue. Total fulfillment costs reach ¥2.5B,
aggregating 900K orders at ¥3.5B, where shipping costs are 14% at ¥500M, packaging at ¥300M, and handling at ¥1.2B,
averaging ¥3,888 per order or 14% of revenue, culminating in 1.5M total orders and ¥6B, with an average cost of ¥4,000 or
13% of revenue, totaling ¥10B. Additionally, the Live Commerce Metrics show Q1 2023 with a conversion rate of 9.5%,
average order value of CNY350, customer acquisition cost CNY200, return rate of 5.2%, net profit margin of 15.0%, sales
growth rate at 20.5%, and market share of 12.0%. In Q2 2023, the conversion rate rises to 10.0%, average order value CNY360,
cost CNY210, return rate 4.8%, profit margin 14.5%, growth rate 21.0%, and market share 11.5%. Q3 2023 sees a conversion
rate of 11.2%, an order value of CNY370, acquisition cost CNY220, return rate 4.5%, profit margin 13.8%, growth rate 22.0%,
and market share 11.0%.
FulfillmentCostAnalysis  CostBreakdownbyRegion  TotalOrders  TotalRevenue  AvgCostperOrder  CostPercentage

2023Q4  2023Q3  TotalCost  ShippingCost  PackagingCost  HandlingCost

Finally, Q4 2023 reports a conversion rate of 12.5%, average order value CNY380, customer acquisition cost CNY230, return
rate 4.2%, net profit margin 13.0%, sales growth at 23.5%, and a market share of 10.5%.
LiveCommerceMetrics  ConversionRate  AverageOrderValue  CustomerAcquisitionCost  ReturnRate  NetProfitMargin  SalesGrowthRate  MarketShare
LiveStreamSessions  TotalViews  TotalSales  UniqueCustomers  NewCustomers  RepeatCustomers  TotalRevenue  GrossMargin  OperatingMargin  TrafficSources  AudienceEngagement
The Total for 2023 presents an overall conversion rate of 10.8%, average order value CNY365, acquisition cost CNY215, return
rate 4.8%, net profit margin 14.5%, growth rate 21.5%, and market share at 11.3%. Total revenue for the year reaches
CNY350M, with gross margin reported at 27.5%.
